caption: A man is seated in what appears to be a clothing store or studio, wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "I NEVER DO SHIT" printed on the front. He sits behind a professional microphone on a boom arm. In the background, several framed photographs hang on a wall, and a white male mannequin wearing a white shirt and grey pants stands beside a rack of colorful clothing. A black office chair is positioned behind the man. On-screen logos including "THE REAL" and "TOT" are visible in the lower corners. Across the sequence, the man speaks and slightly shifts his head and facial expressions, while the camera remains stationary. The background and equipment remain constant throughout the clip.
